feedback.text: As a citizen of the European Union, I should have consumer rights with regard to certain types of digital content. A recent example of an EU movement pointing to this is ‘Stop Destroying Videogames’, where an end to closing online games is requested, without any options to play on offline or community-created servers. I am concerned about the digital future to which the video game industry is currently walking, including games for a single player, and mobile games with the requirement of a mandatory internet connection.
